task_text: Using vendor_nda_template.txt as reference, write a short cover email (3-4 sentences) that we can send to a new vendor, Apex Data Services, asking them to review and sign the attached NDA. Save it as apex_nda_cover_email.txt.

content.text: Let me start by reading the template file to understand the NDA details before writing the cover email.

content.content:
NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between
NovaBridge Solutions Inc. ("Disclosing Party") and [VENDOR NAME] ("Receiving Party").

1. Confidential Information
The Receiving Party agrees to hold in strict confidence all technical, business,
and operational information disclosed by the Disclosing Party, including but not
limited to source code, system architecture, client data, and business processes.

2. Term
This Agreement shall remain in effect for three (3) years from the date of signature,
unless terminated earlier by written agreement of both parties.

3. Permitted Disclosures
The Receiving Party may disclose Confidential Information only to employees with a
demonstrated need to know, provided such employees are bound by equivalent obligations.

4. Return of Materials
Upon request or termination, the Receiving Party shall promptly return or certify
destruction of all Confidential Information and copies thereof.

5. Governing Law
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, USA.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties execute this Agreement as of the date below.

NovaBridge Solutions Inc.
Signature: _________________________ Date: __________
Name / Title:

[VENDOR NAME]
Signature: _________________________ Date: __________
Name / Title:

content.text: Great, I have all the details I need. Now I'll write and save the cover email.

input.content:
Subject: Non-Disclosure Agreement – Apex Data Services & NovaBridge Solutions Inc.

Dear Apex Data Services Team,

We are excited to move forward with our partnership and have attached a Non-Disclosure Agreement from NovaBridge Solutions Inc. for your review. The agreement outlines the confidentiality obligations for both parties regarding technical, business, and operational information shared throughout our engagement, and remains in effect for a term of three (3) years from the date of signature. Please review the document at your earliest convenience, sign where indicated, and return the executed copy to us. If you have any questions or require clarification on any of the terms, don't hesitate to reach out — we're happy to assist.

Warm regards,
NovaBridge Solutions Inc.

content.text:
Done! The file **apex_nda_cover_email.txt** has been saved. Here's a summary of what was included in the email, drawing directly from the NDA template:

- **Tone & Purpose** – Warm but professional, clearly stating the intent to have Apex Data Services review and sign the NDA.
- **Key NDA Details Referenced** – Mentions the scope of confidential information (technical, business, and operational) and the **3-year term**, keeping the vendor informed without overwhelming them with legal jargon.
- **Clear Call to Action** – Asks them to review, sign, and return the executed document.
- **Open Door** – Invites any questions to keep communication smooth and professional.

Let me know if you'd like to adjust the tone, add a contact name, or send it directly via email!
